title: Project Timeline Creator
scenario: Generate a simple project timeline for a software development project, including milestones, deadlines, and task assignments. The output should be in a text format.
constraints: Must include the project name, start date, and end date
Use a standard format for task assignments

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt includes the required details (project name, start date, end date) and uses a standard format for task assignments.
Verify if the project timeline includes milestones, deadlines, and task assignments.
Evaluate if the tone is professional and concise.
